attacking_style: Insufficient data on successful attacks. Observations focus on positioning failures rather than offensive actions, suggesting reactive rather than proactive racing in stage races.
team_tactics: Bora team positioning appears problematic in critical moments, with Majka caught in teammate-involved crashes. Poor collective positioning protocol in danger zones compromises GC protection.
terrain_preference: Designated for mountain stages as GC contender, but lack of successful positioning suggests difficulty managing technical descents or nervous race sections before climbs.
vulnerability: Severely exposed by poor positioning in nervous race conditions. Both observations show GC elimination via crashes before reaching preferred climbing terrain, indicating spatial awareness issues in peloton.
key_patterns: Eliminated from GC contention via crashes in identical race two consecutive years (2017, 2018)
Poor positioning cost entire race outcome before reaching decisive climbs both times
Clustered with own Bora teammates in crashes, suggesting team-wide positioning deficiency
form_trajectory: unknown: Both observations document positioning failures rather than form indicators. No data on climbing performance when reaching key terrain unscathed.
